title: Verify existing implementation of login and register endpoints
description: The /login and /register API endpoints already exist at src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts and src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts. AuthService.login() is implemented in src/auth/auth-service.ts with JWT tokens signed using HS256. JWT access token expires in 7 days, refresh token in 30 days. Tests in auth-service.test.ts cover login functionality. Verification needed to confirm all acceptance criteria are met.
existing_patterns: src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts - Next.js Route Handler pattern with POST method, extracts ipAddress/userAgent headers, uses getPayloadInstance() for Payload SDK
src/auth/auth-service.ts - Service layer with login method that throws typed errors with status codes, uses Payload collections API
src/auth/jwt-service.ts - JWT signing with HS256 using Web Crypto API (crypto.subtle), 7-day access token, 30-day refresh token
src/auth/auth-service.test.ts - Vitest unit tests with mock Payload, tests login success and error cases
